findings.summary: 32 PCIe Rx/Tx differential lanes falsely classified as UART signals due to net name pattern matching on "Rx"/"Tx"

incorrect.description: All 32 Rx/Tx PCIe differential nets classified as UART. These are multi-gigabit serial lanes, not UART.

suggestions: UART detector should verify presence of UART transceiver IC, not just pattern-match on Rx/Tx net names
